compositional_truth_check.reconciliation_notes: The biome has undergone a catastrophic collapse. The P3 Pothos (anchor) and the white rabbit figurine are no longer present in the frame. The yellow pot (P1) and black pot (P2/P4) are present but appear devoid of viable plant life.

plant_audit.P1: Yellow pot is empty; soil surface shows no signs of growth.
plant_audit.P2: Black pot contains only debris/eggshell fragments; no living tissue detected.

biome_observations.soil_texture: Appears dry and compacted in all visible pots.
biome_observations.debris: Significant presence of crushed eggshell fragments in the black pot, likely an unsuccessful soil amendment attempt.

temporal_deltas.earliest_to_T-4: Initial decline observed; Pothos leaf turgor loss.
temporal_deltas.T-4_to_T-2: Progressive wilting and loss of structural integrity of the Pothos specimen.
temporal_deltas.T-1_to_current: Total removal of specimens. The biome has been cleared of all living botanical assets.

visual_health_inference.conclusion: The biome is currently non-functional. All registered specimens have either perished or been removed from the environment. The presence of eggshells suggests an attempt at nutrient supplementation that failed to prevent the total loss of the collection.

anomalies: Complete removal of all botanical specimens.
Disappearance of the white rabbit scale anchor.
Persistent eggshell debris in the black pot.
vision_report.narrative_description: The botanical audit reveals a total systemic failure. Over the course of the observed sequence, the plants exhibited signs of terminal decline, culminating in their complete removal from the desk. The environment is now sterile, consisting only of empty pots and residual debris. No living plant matter remains to be monitored.
